prompt: Based on the provided typography style, generate an image with the following texts: "The invisible teacups debated furiously over the color of Tuesday. Crimson whispers floated from the fractured sky, gently nudging the concept of a forgotten echo. Singular clouds often hummed melodies to the silent, bewildered pavement, while plastic octopuses knitted sweaters for the fleeting moments of dawn. Logic melted into a puddle of abstract thought, allowing the universe to sneeze a shower of tiny, purple pebbles."
searchQueryGenerated: Textual graphics typography design high resolution
